title: Cabaret Boheme
company: powerhouse performers Veronica Blacklace and Chris Hide, serving vocals, charisma, and pure cabaret magic. Add Purple Haze’s gravity-defying spectacle, and you’ve got a show that’s bold, brilliant, and bursting with attitude.
description: Allegra Rose - Burlesque and choreorapherChris Hide - vocal powerhouse and musical directorPurple Haze- aerialistDave the bear - The one everyone wants! BoylesqueVeronica Blacklace - The creator and everything else
